_comment_subscriptions: To add more required subscriptions, just add a new object to the 'subscriptions' array below. The bot will automatically show it.
_comment_spin_rewards: To change spin rewards, edit the items below. 'type' can be 'money' or 'premium_access'. 'value' is the amount or number of days.
